overall.description: Cinematic footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a sleek futuristic vehicle on a rooftop terrace, with the camera pulling back to reveal a sprawling sci-fi cityscape with towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and neon signage under a clear morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop terrace with futuristic vehicle display

events.description: camera moves past the vehicle, beginning to reveal the cityscape behind it

agents.ego_description: cinematic drone camera orbiting around the sleek black vehicle and moving toward the rooftop edge

notable_agents.action: futuristic matte-black hovercar with circular intakes parked on the terrace

entered.detail: stylized green tree in a planter on the rooftop terrace
transparent glass barrier along the edge of the rooftop
modern tiled rooftop surface with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxury rooftop terrace featuring a sleek futuristic black vehicle. The camera orbits left around the vehicle, revealing a decorative tree and glass railings, with a distant city skyline visible in the background under clear morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial panorama of futuristic city skyline

events.description: vehicle exits frame right, revealing full cityscape view
camera accelerates upward and backward to show greater city depth

agents.ego_description: drone camera pulling back and rising to showcase the expansive cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: multi-level highway interchange winding between buildings
large digital advertising screens with colorful graphics on building facades
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with varied architectural designs

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle exits the frame, the camera pulls back to reveal a sprawling futuristic cityscape. Elevated highways snake between towering skyscrapers while neon billboards become visible on building facades. The camera continues rising to show the density and verticality of the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical downtown canyon with street view below

events.description: camera tilts downward to reveal street level far below between buildings

agents.ego_description: aerial drone moving forward over the city and looking down into the urban canyons below

entered.detail: octagonal building top with multiple levels and glass walls
deep vertical gaps between skyscrapers showing streets far below

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving over the dense urban fabric, focusing on a distinctive circular rooftop structure before tilting down to reveal the deep street canyons below. The view emphasizes the extreme verticality of the cyberpunk city, with buildings towering on all sides and narrow streets visible far beneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins on an intimate luxury terrace and expands into a sweeping aerial vista of a vertical cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by orbiting a sleek black futuristic vehicle beside a decorative tree and glass railings, with the distant skyline shimmering under clear morning light. As the vehicle exits the frame, the camera pulls back and rises, shifting the focus from the rooftop to a sprawling cityscape of towering skyscrapers and snaking elevated highways adorned with neon billboards. The scene then expands further over the dense urban fabric, gliding past a distinctive circular rooftop structure before tilting downward. Finally, the camera plunges its gaze into the deep street canyons below, emphasizing the extreme verticality of the city as buildings tower over the narrow streets far beneath.
